name: MACRO Ontology (PESTEL, Scenarios, Futures Funnel, Backcasting)
description: Outermost strategic analysis layer: PESTEL environmental scanning, Scenario Planning with strategy stress-testing, Futures Funnel (cone of plausibility), and Backcasting (reverse-engineering from vision). PESTEL enriches existing orgctx:Trend entities. Scenarios stress-test VSOM strategies for robustness. Backcasting reverse-engineers from VSOM VisionComponent to executable milestones. Part of VE-Series VSOM-SA sub-series.

components.PESTELAnalysis: Structured environmental scan across six macro dimensions
components.PESTELFactor: Individual factor with impact/probability scoring and trend enrichment
components.ScenarioSet: Collection of 3-5 plausible futures on a 2x2 uncertainty matrix
components.Scenario: Single plausible future with narrative, assumptions, early warning signals
components.ScenarioStrategyAssessment: Strategy-scenario effectiveness assessment for robustness testing
components.FuturesFunnel: Cone of plausibility: Possible to Plausible to Probable to Preferable
components.BackcastingPlan: Reverse-engineered path from desired future to present milestones
components.BackcastMilestone: Required state on the backcasting path with target year and dependencies

crossOntology.name: backcastsFromVision
crossOntology.purpose: Backcasting works backward from VSOM vision

crossOntology.name: feedsSWOTFactor
crossOntology.purpose: PESTEL provides evidence for SWOT external factors

versionHistory.changes: Initial release — PESTEL, Scenario Planning, Futures Funnel, Backcasting

notes: Layer 1 (Macro) of VSOM Strategy Analysis. PESTEL enriches existing orgctx:Trend entities — no duplication. Feeds into VSOM VisionComponent and INDUSTRY-ONT SWOT external factors.
